rationale: In the citing paper, Libai et al. (2013) appears in grouped citations that provide general background on WOM programs, adoption dynamics, and prior ABM-oriented marketing work. The authors do not engage the cited paper's specific acceleration-versus-expansion framework, customer-equity decomposition, or network simulation results when building or validating their freemium DSS. The citation therefore serves as contextual literature support rather than a distinct conceptual or methodological input to this study.
